title: Workshop: Build a Heat-Check Notification Card
summary: Workshop: Build a Heat-Check Notification Card retrieves prior skills in an original interactive neighbor wellness notification card scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css action pseudo classes, css structural pseudo classes, css functional pseudo classes, css pseudo elements in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real interactive neighbor wellness notification card artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Continue the Community Needs Survey state work here. -->
starterFiles.css: /* Continue the survey state and selector system here. */
